1843400.name: The Last Disease Z
1843400.description:
Overview

The Last Disease Z is a harsh open-world survival experience where every step can be your last. The abandoned island hides not only traces of civilization but also threats lurking in the shadows. Fight, build, and explore to survive amidst chaos, where the living can be just as dangerous as the dead.

The island looks peaceful only at first glance. An abandoned city, deserted villages, a ruined military base - all of it reminds you of a time when humans still controlled what was happening. Now chaos reigns: zombies roam the streets, mutants hide in the forests, and armed bandits set up ambushes at the most valuable points of interest.

You’ll start from scratch: gather resources, craft tools, build a shelter, and defend it from raids by other players and hostile factions. Every trip beyond your base is a test. Every item you find is a chance to survive a little longer.

Develop your character’s skills, explore the island, hunt, and fight - only the toughest will endure.

Key Features

Open island world with a city, villages, a military base, and diverse points of interest

Explore various locations - from abandoned city streets to quiet villages and a deserted military base, each offering unique loot and hidden dangers.

Sandbox with no story limitations

Play your way: survive alone, join factions, build fortresses, or hunt for loot - no scripted boundaries.

Crafting weapons, tools, medicine, and resources

Create everything you need to survive - from basic tools to firearms and medical supplies.

Base building and construction of your own stronghold

Build a house or a fortified base with multi-layered defenses - walls, traps, barricades, and smart layouts will help you stay alive.
1843400.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
